location: Dropped by Maleigh Marais, Shaded Castle Castellan — a hostile NPC (categorized as a Hostile NPC, not a true boss) who wanders the rocky fields west of The Shaded Castle, in the company of a sleeping halberd-wielding Guardian Golem. Guaranteed drop on defeat.
tactics: Maleigh wields the Antspur Rapier himself and applies scarlet rot on every hit, plus occasionally casts Poisonous Mist from a sacred seal — bring rot resistance or curatives
He moves quickly and circles at range rather than closing in, so be ready to chase or bait him into melee
A halberd Guardian Golem sleeps nearby; getting too close to its spawn point (or hitting it) wakes it up — lure Maleigh toward the swamp or away from the golem to avoid fighting both at once
One kill guarantees the drop, so there's no need to farm
lore: Forged from the spur of a giant ant, this rapier weeps scarlet rot instead of blood. Its wielder, Castellan Maleigh Marais, treated the rot as a private article of faith rather than a plague — devotion that was eventually answered when he found a goddess of his own.

builds.name: Keen Dex thrusting build
builds.why: Keen affinity pushes Dexterity scaling to its highest point while the scarlet rot buildup (55) stays fixed regardless of affinity, so a pure-Dex investment gets full value from both the damage and the free status proc.

builds.name: Quality powerstance rot
builds.why: Quality affinity gives an even STR/DEX split, useful for dual-wielding two Antspur Rapiers (or pairing with another thrusting sword) to stack scarlet rot procs faster through rapid triple-hit combos.
